data.title: Binance Futures to Delist COIN-M GMTUSD and DOGSUSD Contracts
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, Binance Futures will close all positions and conduct an automatic settlement on the COIN-M GMTUSD and DOGSUSD Perpetual Contracts at 2025-10-28 09:00 (UTC). Following the settlement, these contracts will be delisted. Users are advised to close any open positions before the delisting time to avoid automatic settlement. Starting from 2025-10-28 08:30 (UTC), no new positions can be opened for these contracts.

During the final hour before the scheduled settlement, the Futures Insurance Fund will not support the liquidation process for these contracts. Any liquidation triggered in this period will be executed as a single Immediate or Cancel order (IOCO), which will be offloaded into the market in one attempt. If the IOCO execution leaves sufficient assets in the user's account to meet the required Maintenance Margin, the liquidation will cease. However, if the IOCO fails to fully reduce the position to meet Margin Maintenance requirements, any unfilled portion will be resolved through the Auto-Deleveraging (ADL) process. Users are strongly advised to monitor and manage open positions during this final hour due to potential heightened volatility and reduced liquidity.

To protect users and mitigate risks in volatile market conditions, Binance Futures may implement additional protective measures for these contracts without further notice. These measures could include adjusting maximum leverage, position value, and maintenance margin in each margin tier, updating funding rates, changing the price index constituents, and using the Last Price Protected mechanism to update the Mark Price. Users should be aware of these potential changes and manage their positions accordingly.

data.title: JPMorgan Predicts Gold Prices to Surge Amid Fed Rate Cuts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, JPMorgan has identified gold as its top long-term investment for this year. The financial institution anticipates that the ongoing cycle of interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve will provide further upward momentum for gold prices. JPMorgan projects that by 2028, the price of gold could reach $6,000.

data.title: Ripple Co-Founder Chris Larsen Profits from XRP Sales Amid Market Trends
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Ripple co-founder Chris Larsen has realized significant profits from his XRP sales, totaling $764,209,610 since 2018. This development comes as XRP faces potential further losses, with Larsen continuing to cash out his XRP holdings. Analyst J. A. Maartunn from CryptoQuant highlighted Larsen's tendency to sell near local highs, a pattern that has drawn both criticism and understanding from the market. While some view Larsen's actions as strategic profit-taking, others accuse him of deliberately offloading at peak prices. Maartunn's analysis shows that Larsen's realized profits have surged in 2025, reaching $764.2 million from less than $200 million over seven years ago.

In a recent transaction, Larsen transferred 50 million XRP from his wallet, which he confirmed was an investment in the Evernorth treasury. This move aligns with his ongoing strategy of capitalizing on XRP's market performance. Despite the controversy, Larsen still holds a substantial amount of XRP, estimated at up to $9 billion, which could continue to influence market dynamics. The XRP/USD pair is currently trading 34% below its multi-year highs of $3.66, a decline partly attributed to large outflows from Larsen's wallet. For XRP to reverse its downtrend, it must reclaim the 200-day simple moving average (SMA) at $2.60, a level that has historically preceded significant price recoveries. The next resistance levels are identified at the $2.74-$2.80 range and the 100-day SMA at $2.94, which, if surpassed, could signal the end of the current downtrend.

Market indicators suggest potential for a price rebound, supported by a bullish divergence in the relative strength index (RSI) and a possible bullish cross from the moving average convergence divergence (MACD). These signals indicate weakening in the prevailing downtrend, encouraging traders to buy on dips as investor interest grows and seller exhaustion sets in. To confirm a bullish reversal, XRP must break above the 20-day exponential moving average (EMA) at $2.55. However, investors are advised to conduct their own research and consider the inherent risks involved in trading and investment decisions. This article does not provide investment advice or recommendations.

data.title: EU Sanctions Russian Ruble-Pegged Stablecoin A7A5 After Conflict Escalation
data.description:
EU imposes sanctions on A7A5 stablecoin pegged to Russian ruble, effective November 25, 2025.
source: https://coincu.com/news/eu-sanctions-a7a5-stablecoin-2/

data.title: Revolut Secures MiCA License to Expand Crypto Services in Europe
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Revolut has successfully obtained a Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) license from the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (CySEC). This development allows the fintech company to offer regulated cryptocurrency services across all 30 markets within the European Economic Area (EEA). The acquisition of this license marks a significant step in Revolut's expansion within the crypto market, as the company prepares to launch its next-generation platform, Crypto 2.0.

Revolut's CEO of Digital Assets Europe, Costas Michael, emphasized that this authorization enables the company to deliver innovative crypto products with enhanced transparency and trust for its expanding customer base. The MiCA license permits Revolut to market its comprehensive suite of crypto products under a regulated framework. With a customer base exceeding 65 million globally, including 40 million in Europe, Revolut plans to leverage this license to broaden its offerings in crypto trading, staking, and stablecoins.

The introduction of Crypto 2.0 is set to provide access to over 280 tokens, zero-fee staking with returns of up to 22% annual percentage yield, and 1:1 stablecoin-to-US dollar conversion without spreads. When combined with crypto-enabled Revolut Visa/Mastercard cards, seamless on/off-ramping tools, and Revolut X's low trading fees, the platform aims to deliver one of the most comprehensive and cost-effective crypto experiences in Europe.

Last year, Revolut launched Revolut X, a dedicated desktop crypto exchange designed for experienced traders. This platform offers trading for 100 tokens with low fees and real-time on/off-ramp capabilities. Since its expansion across 30 markets in the EEA, Revolut X has attracted over 14 million crypto users globally, with mobile access available via the App Store and Google Play.

In addition to these developments, Revolut is reportedly expanding its crypto expertise, particularly for institutional clients, as it prepares to enter the crypto derivatives market. In June, a spokesperson confirmed the company's intentions to enhance its offerings in this area. Furthermore, in May, Revolut announced plans to invest over 1 billion euros ($1.1 billion) in France and apply for a local banking license as part of its regional expansion strategy.

data.title: Ethereum Whale Scoops Up $32M in ETH as Bitcoin, Solana Whales Cash Out
data.description:
The Ethereum whale buy signals institutional interest, analysts said, while a Solana whale dumped $93M, showing a shift in market preference.
source: https://decrypt.co/345624/ethereum-whale-scoops-up-32m-in-eth-as-bitcoin-solana-whales-cash-out

data.title: WinkLink and DigiFinex reached a strategic cooperation
data.description: WinkLink, the decentralized oracle network within the TRON ecosystem, and DigiFinex, a digital asset trading platform, have officially established a strategic partnership. The two parties will strengthen the integration of exchange infrastructure and oracle services, jointly build a transparent and trusted data ecosystem, and promote the large-scale application of blockchain technology in the real economy. This collaboration will bring more real-world application scenarios to users of the DigiFinex and WinkLink ecosystems.

data.title: Who Are You Trying to Protect?
data.description:
As the SEC loosens custody rules for digital assets, it's not a win for deregulation but a concession to reality. Investor protection now hinges on keeping people inside a broken system, not perfecting it.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/10/23/who-are-you-trying-to-protect/

data.title: KuCoin Announces Launch of KuPool, Its Mining Pool Service, Further Upgrading Its Ecosystem
data.description: KuCoin today announced the launch of KuPool, its mining pool service, further upgrading its ecosystem and establishing a new paradigm for "hash power finance." Led by mining expert Zhu Yu, KuPool leverages KuCoin's strengths in security and compliance to create an efficient and transparent mining system. KuPool supports mainstream and merged mining cryptocurrencies such as LTC, DOGE, PEPE, Lucky, and BELLS, and will soon launch a BTC mining pool. KuPool is committed to providing global miners with verifiable hash power and a trusted mining experience, fully embodying KuCoin's new brand proposition: "Trust First, Transactions Later."

data.title: AI-powered Web3 dating platform METYA secures $6 million in strategic funding led by Echo3 and Greenwood Global Capital
data.description: METYA, an AI-powered Web3 dating platform, has officially announced the completion of a $6 million strategic funding round led by Echo3 and Greenwood Global Capital. Metya is an AI-powered Web3 dating platform that combines social interaction with a token economy, enabling users to connect globally and earn financial benefits through participation. METYA offers real-time communication, content creation, and data sharing, all powered by a decentralized social infrastructure.

data.title: UK Government and OpenAI Expand Data Hosting Agreement
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the UK government has reached an agreement with OpenAI to broaden the scope of data hosting. This development marks a significant step in enhancing data management capabilities between the two entities.

data.title: EU Sanctions Russian-Backed A7A5 Stablecoin to Curb Evasion
data.description:
EU targets A7A5 stablecoin, pegged to the Russian ruble, to address sanctions evasion. Implementation set for November 25, 2025.
source: https://coincu.com/news/eu-sanctions-a7a5-stablecoin/

data.title: OKX to launch BLUAIUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: According to official news, OKX will officially launch the BLUAIUSDT perpetual contract on its website, app, and API at 6:00 PM (UTC+8) on October 23, 2025. Bluwhale is reportedly the intelligent layer of Web3, leveraging consumers' mobile devices to collaborate on decentralized data, storage, and computing power.

data.title: A whale withdrew another 8.515 million PROVE from Binance and Bybit, bringing its total holdings to $21.14 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale (0x352...8792) withdrew another 8.515 million PROVE tokens from Binance and Bybit, valued at $6.84 million. The whale currently holds a total of 25.97 million PROVE tokens, valued at $21.14 million.

data.title: WazirX bets on zero-fee crypto trading to drive relaunch after long hiatus
data.description:
WazirX’s phased comeback begins Oct. 24, offering 30 days of zero-fee trading as the exchange rebuilds liquidity and trust after a long hiatus.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/wazirx-restart-zero-fee-trading-after-hack?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F_dc%3D1761215383837%26cachebust%3Dtrue&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Google's quantum chip Willow achieves verified quantum acceleration, threatening Bitcoin's encryption security again
data.description: Google's latest quantum processor, Willow, has achieved experimentally verified quantum acceleration, operating at speeds far exceeding Frontier, the world's most powerful supercomputer, marking the entry of quantum computing into the reproducible experimental stage. Research shows that Willow is approximately 13,000 times faster at executing physical algorithms, completing tasks in just two hours that would take a traditional computer 3.2 years to simulate. Experts point out that while this breakthrough is still in the research stage, it brings quantum computing one step closer to practical application and poses potential risks to the elliptic curve cryptography that Bitcoin relies on. Christopher Peikert, a professor at the University of Michigan, warned that quantum computing poses a "substantial and even existential risk" to Bitcoin in the long term, although the short-term threat remains limited. (Decrypt)

data.title: Crypto has become Kim Jong-Un’s lifeline — and Russia’s secret weapon
data.description:
According to a new report, crypto is earning North Korea billions in foreign currency every year and it's helping Russia acquire weapons.
source: https://protos.com/crypto-has-become-kim-jong-uns-lifeline-and-russias-secret-weapon/

data.title: US national debt reaches a new ATH of $38 trillion
data.description:
The US national debt has surpassed $38 trillion, marking one of the fastest increases in history and raising fiscal alarm.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-national-debt-ath-of-38-trillion/

data.title: Revolut prepares to launch crypto services in Europe after securing MiCA license
data.description: Fintech giant Revolut is poised to launch its cryptocurrency services across the EU after receiving a license under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Directive (MiCA). Revolut announced Wednesday that it has received a MiCA license from the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission. This license allows Revolut to promote its cryptocurrency services in 30 countries within the European Economic Area. Revolut's MiCA license also heralds the imminent launch of "Crypto 2.0." The company stated that the new service will provide users with access to over 280 cryptocurrencies, zero-fee staking services, and zero-difference stablecoin to USD conversions. (DL News)

data.title: WLFI reserves ALT5 Sigma CEO suspended, shares down 83% from 52-week high
data.description: ALT5 Sigma, a publicly traded company that recently announced the adoption of a WLFI reserve strategy, has had its CEO, Peter Tassiopoulos, suspended by the board and relieved of his paid duties. Jonathan Hugh has been appointed acting CEO, effective immediately. The management changes come as the company's stock price has fallen nearly 20% over the past week, and 83% from its 52-week high of $10.95. The company's next earnings report is due on November 18.
